name: race-condition-multi-correction
anchor: Layer 3 #21 (multiple correction emails within minutes — last-write-wins?)
rationale: Broker sends initial intake, then within minutes sends two consecutive corrections to the same field (loan_amount). Three corrections of the same field arrive rapidly. F3.BR routes each as broker_correction; F1.LA canonical_map must resolve final value. Expected behavior is UNDEFINED — possibilities include: (a) last-write-wins (most recent correction is authoritative), (b) reject after N corrections within window (rate limiting), (c) flag for admin disambiguation. Layer 3 product-design item.
notes: Three-event sequence: intake + correction-1 (loan_amount → $X) + correction-2 (loan_amount → $Y) within an hour. Phase 4 spec: pending_product_decision for the resolution semantic.
